name: Crockpot Cheese Fondue Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package Freeze dried or fresh chive
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the condensed soup, grated cheese, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, and chives in a bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to the crock-pot and cover.
3. Cook on low for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, stirring occasionally until smooth and well blended.
4. Keep the dip hot in the pot while serving.
